narration: A stack is a pile where we add and remove only from the top.
callout: The top item is the one at the end.

narration: Push means putting a new item on top. After pushing 9, the newest item becomes the top.

predictionPrompt.prompt: If we pop right now, which value comes out?

choices.feedback: Correct. The newest item is on top.
Not this one. 2 is near the bottom.

narration: Pop removes the top item, and peek looks at it without removing it.
callout: Stacks follow last in, first out.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why is a pile of plates a good example of a stack?
reflectionPrompt.placeholder: It is a good example because...
